docs: Set the candidate charities for the upcoming (or current) epoch.
`names` and `addrs` must have the same length (max 5).
endpoints.name: setEpochCharities

docs: Cast a vote for a charity in the current epoch. One vote per wallet.
endpoints.name: vote

docs: Start a new epoch. Increments epoch counter, records start timestamp,
resets top-painter tracking.
endpoints.name: startEpoch

docs: Start a new epoch AND open a 24h auction for the given 20×20 zone.
endpoints.name: startEpochWithAuction

docs: End the current epoch. Distributes accumulated PIXEL to the default charity
and accumulated EGLD to the vote-winning charity (or default if no votes).
Optionally accepts a canvas PNG URI for NFT metadata (passed as hex by admin UI).
endpoints.name: endEpoch

docs: Place a bid in the current epoch's auction.
endpoints.name: placeBid

docs: Withdraw a non-winning bid (or any bid once auction is closed).
endpoints.name: withdrawBid

docs: Close the current epoch's auction (owner only). Sets the winner and
commits the winning bid to the charity accumulator.
endpoints.name: closeAuction

docs: Returns the top painter's address and pixel count for the current epoch.
endpoints.name: getEpochTopPainter

docs: Returns (names, addresses) for charities registered in `epoch`.
endpoints.name: getEpochCharities

docs: Returns vote counts per charity for `epoch` (parallel to getEpochCharities).
endpoints.name: getVoteTallies

docs: Returns the charity index the caller voted for, or 255 if not voted.
endpoints.name: getMyVote

docs: Returns full auction state for the given epoch.
endpoints.name: getAuctionState

docs: Returns a specific address's total bid for the given epoch.
endpoints.name: getMyBid

docs: Returns the NFT collection token identifier.
endpoints.name: getNftCollectionId

docs: Returns whether the auction is currently active for the given epoch.
endpoints.name: isAuctionActive
